sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95594" key="somfo/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σομφ-όομαι</orth>, <sense id="n95594.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">become spongy</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
